problems.diagnostic: parsing Package_Specification, Empty packages are not allowed
problems.cause: Empty package declaration in EMV2 annex
problems.minimal_edit: Remove or populate the empty package declaration in the EMV2 annex

problems.cause: Invalid syntax or malformed annex block
problems.minimal_edit: Correct the syntax of the EMV2 annex block to ensure valid AADL parsing

executor_steps: Identify the EMV2 annex block in ADIRUp_process.impl
Check for empty or malformed package declarations within the EMV2 annex
Remove any empty package declarations or correct them to valid AADL syntax
Ensure the EMV2 annex block is syntactically valid and properly closed
Verify that all referenced types and behaviors in the EMV2 annex are properly declared in the model or imported via 'use' clauses
